name: ColorPicker
description: An interactive color selection surface with saturation area, hue control, optional alpha control, and swatches.

slots.saturation: Two-dimensional area for saturation and value changes.
slots.swatches: Optional list of predefined color choices.

keyboardNavigation: Arrow keys adjust active slider or saturation handle
Home and End move slider handles to bounds

aria.aria-label: Provide labels for saturation, hue, alpha, and swatch controls.
